title: mentha horridula
intro: Mentha horridula, also known as horrid mint, is a species of mint native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Mentha horridula include relief from digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, Mentha horridula is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
